jobs.name: Daily inbox triage
jobs.systemEvent: Run the inbox-triage skill: call inbox_triage_run() and then briefly summarise what you delivered.

jobs.name: Daily journal
jobs.systemEvent: Use memory_search with the query 'today' (k=20). Read the most relevant items and write a short (3-5 sentence) journal entry summarising the day. Save it via memory_remember with tags ['journal', '<today's date YYYY-MM-DD>'].
